name: lbc-bird-report
description: LBC Bird Report — import, standardise, map and export bird observation data

scripts.dev: electron-vite build && electron-builder --dir && pkill -x 'LBC Bird Report' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && cp release/mac-arm64/LBC\ Bird\ Report.app/Contents/Resources/app.asar /Applications/LBC\ Bird\ Report.app/Contents/Resources/app.asar && rm -rf /Applications/LBC\ Bird\ Report.app/Contents/Resources/app.asar.unpacked && cp -R release/mac-arm64/LBC\ Bird\ Report.app/Contents/Resources/app.asar.unpacked /Applications/LBC\ Bird\ Report.app/Contents/Resources/app.asar.unpacked && codesign --force --deep --sign 'Apple Development: Jonathan Cooper (JU28YW4VRS)' --entitlements build/entitlements.mac.plist /Applications/LBC\ Bird\ Report.app && echo 'Build complete — open LBC Bird Report from Spotlight or Applications'
